channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
item.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

item.title: The U.S. seizes another oil tanker as peace talks with Iran remain in limbo
item.description: The seizure comes after President Trump told Fox News Wednesday that there was "no time pressure" on the ceasefire with Iran, which he has extended in...

item.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
item.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints — more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

item.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
item.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the S...

item.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

item.title: AI galaxy hunters are adding to the global GPU crunch
item.description: Astronomers are turning to GPUs to find needles in the galactic haystack.

item.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out prepaid phone recharges to its 500 million users in India via PayU.

item.title: Surveillance vendors caught abusing access to telcos to track people’s phone locations, researchers say
item.description: The Citizen Lab found two separate surveillance vendors abusing the backbone of cellular networks to spy on several victims across the world.

item.title: Meta will now allow parents to see the topics their child discussed with Meta AI
item.description: Topics can range from "School," "Entertainment," and "Lifestyle" to "Travel," "Writing," and "Health and Wellbeing," among others, Meta says.

item.title: Beehiiv rolls out new creator tools, including webinars and customizable paywalls
item.description: Beehiiv is clearly done being just a newsletter platform based on today's launch of a new webinar feature, customizable paywalls, and more.

item.title: The Fed’s High-Stakes Power Struggle Affects Much More Than Mortgage Rates
item.description: Something is brewing at the Federal Reserve, and it’s starting to get ugly. For many months, President Trump has been pressuring the Fed to lower the ...

item.title: Michael Zuber: Why the Average American Won’t Make It Without Rentals
item.description: By buying just One Rental at a Time, Michael Zuber was able to replace his entire W-2 income, scale from one rental to four, then to over 80 rental un...

item.title: Need Money for a Down Payment? Try These 8 Side Hustles (That Actually Work)
item.description: Don’t have enough cash for a down payment or enough income to qualify for a mortgage? You’re not alone—many rookies have been (or are) in your shoes. ...

item.title: Sweeping Zoning Reforms Presents Opportunities For Multifamily Investments
item.description: With the affordability crisis stinging American pocketbooks and small landlords struggling to maintain cash flow amid high interest rates and property...

item.title: BiggerPockets Pulse: Investor Sentiment Falls Amid International Turmoil and Renewed Economic Concerns
item.description: Retail investors’ hopes for improved market conditions are fading in the second quarter of 2026, but many investors still plan to actively grow their ...
